meta.sourcePolicy: Official HPA/JPA sources only. This index records event-level source candidates and must not auto-promote athlete histories into data/database.json.
notes: Keep event-level sources separate from athlete master data and confirmed athlete histories.
Use result PDFs to support event participation/results only after athlete identity is verified.
Entry lists and schedules are event-entry sources, not confirmed achievement summaries by themselves.

promotionGuardrails: Do not add athlete histories automatically from this event index.
Before promoting a result row to data/database.json, match athlete name, division/class, date, event, and source PDF row.
Records marked in result PDFs require separate record-table verification before being summarized as record-holder achievements.
